read-only.description: Review, research over local files, and planning only.

research-network.description: Current documentation and ecosystem research without local mutation.

workspace-write.description: Scoped implementation in the current worktree; no production or secret access.

browser-lab.description: Local browser automation and visual QA. Auth state must be explicit and disposable.

operator-confirmed.description: Reserved for tasks where the user explicitly grants production/operator scope in the same session.
